_publications._publicationTitle: Capturing the wide variety of impaired fracture healing phenotypes in Neurofibromatosis Type 1 with eight key factors: a computational study.

_contextSnippet: However, for cartilage formation (P) values below 0.05 and endochondral ossification (Y) values below 200, the CI value was always high, leading to an impaired bone healing phenotype
details: Identified that cartilage formation values below 0.05 and endochondral ossification values below 200 always resulted in high CI values leading to impaired bone healing phenotype
